ability: 每个夜晚*，你可以查看魔典并得知任意提交的咒语，然后你要盖上一个角色标记。你提交禁咒后不会死亡。你提交的咒语总是最先被抽中。[无爪牙在场]
firstNightReminder: Place the "SPELL PRIORITY" token on The Veiled One. ALWAYS DRAW THE VEILED ONE'S SPELL FIRST.
otherNightReminder: ALWAYS DRAW THE VEILED ONE'S SPELL FIRST. Show The Veiled One the grimoire and all cast/submitted Spells, then ask them to choose a player. Kill that player and place a "Dead" token on them.
